data.body:
I am in shock. 

9 months ago I rescued a dog in Crete. She has been unwell for five days. Today I learnt she has 14 bullets in her body. Someone shot her 14 times!  A hunter used her to find rabbits, misfired, then tossed her out. I found her.

This kind of cruelty is also applied to refugees.
